explanation: This is a direct replication of the true positive command and will trigger the Sigma rule.
Inserting quotes around the file path is a safe mutation technique that does not alter the behavior of the command and will still trigger the Sigma rule.
Reordering and combining multiple file paths into a single command is a safe mutation technique that preserves the behavior and will still trigger the Sigma rule.
Adding a non-essential switch like /Q (quiet mode) is a safe mutation technique that does not affect the core behavior of the command and will still trigger the Sigma rule.
